completion_boundary: The current artifacts support the scoped paper claim, but the broader user goal remains active because Reviewer-2 production blockers remain open.

evidence: same-path DOGI-style is apples-to-apples replay, not the public DOGI stack
fast_r2_production_blockers.name: full_public_dogi_end_to_end_parity
fast_r2_production_blockers.required_to_close: Run DOGI and QUASAR through the same app/ZenFS/SPDK or equivalent stack with identical trace units.

evidence: zonefs helper replay is accounting evidence, not poll-mode p99 latency
fast_r2_production_blockers.name: spdk_or_zenfs_tail_latency
fast_r2_production_blockers.required_to_close: Implement SPDK/ZenFS or true async xNVMe replay and report p95/p99 append/reset service latency.

evidence: current FDP evidence is handle-collision/purity modeling only
fast_r2_production_blockers.name: physical_fdp_or_faithful_emulator_replay
fast_r2_production_blockers.required_to_close: Run the QUASAR family-to-handle policy on FDP hardware or a faithful FDP emulator.

evidence: physical measurements are scoped to one WD ZN540-class ZNS SSD
device-specific reset/sanitize/FDP behavior is not generalized
fast_r2_production_blockers.name: device_diversity
fast_r2_production_blockers.required_to_close: Repeat append/reset/security/FDP evidence on at least one additional ZNS or FDP-capable device.

main_takeaway: The scoped actual-ZNS comparison is ready: same-path physical replay, workload hardness, pressure, external exact baselines, overhead, security boundaries, and reproducibility are all covered. However, this is not production-grade FAST evidence yet: full public-DOGI end-to-end parity, SPDK/ZenFS tail latency, physical FDP or faithful-emulator replay, device diversity remain open.
optional_strengthening: full_public_dogi_end_to_end_parity: Run DOGI and QUASAR through the same app/ZenFS/SPDK or equivalent stack with identical trace units.
spdk_or_zenfs_tail_latency: Implement SPDK/ZenFS or true async xNVMe replay and report p95/p99 append/reset service latency.
physical_fdp_or_faithful_emulator_replay: Run the QUASAR family-to-handle policy on FDP hardware or a faithful FDP emulator.
device_diversity: Repeat append/reset/security/FDP evidence on at least one additional ZNS or FDP-capable device.

requirements.next_action: Keep this as the apples-to-apples physical ZNS comparison; do not mix units with exact external runs.
requirements.remaining: Exact external DOGI/MiDAS/SepBIT units are still separate from this same-path packed replay.
requirements.requirement: Run the main comparison on a real ZNS path with FIFO/SepBIT/MiDAS/DOGI-style baselines and QUASAR.

requirements.next_action: Use the DOGI-favorable p0 control and YCSB p2000 negative control in the paper narrative.
requirements.remaining: None for the current scoped claim.
requirements.requirement: Show the workload is not an easy QUASAR-only construction.

requirements.next_action: Add more min-free-zone sweeps only if reviewers demand a smoother hardware curve.
requirements.remaining: None for the current scoped claim; larger p10000 actual-ZNS YCSB pressure points have been added.
requirements.requirement: Demonstrate pressure cases where WAF/GC separation appears, not only stale-secret separation.

evidence: DOGI exact Alibaba p8000 suite=3/3, best=CostBenefit WAF=2.803532778684755
DOGI exact original-LBA Alibaba p8000 WAF=3.2117427602002238
requirements.next_action: Keep compact-LBA and original-LBA exact external numbers in a separate table from same-path packed ZNS replay.
requirements.remaining: None for the current scoped claim; exact units remain separate from QUASAR same-path packed replay.
requirements.requirement: Include exact external DOGI/MiDAS/SepBIT evidence without pretending the units are identical.

requirements.next_action: Use QUASAR-DOGI hybrid by default; enable tenant-isolation or strict-residual modes explicitly.
requirements.remaining: Adaptive modes are available but should not be default unless a workload triggers them.
requirements.requirement: Improve QUASAR if the evidence shows a better deployable mode.

requirements.next_action: Use zonefs-helper overhead as full-suite accounting and xNVMe as native command-path p99 evidence.
requirements.remaining: SPDK poll-mode is still not measured, but the lower-overhead raw xNVMe/Linux NVMe ioctl command path is validated.
requirements.requirement: Account for overhead rather than only placement quality.

evidence: sanitize_log_status=(1) Most Recent Sanitize Command Completed Successfully.
requirements.next_action: State exposure-window reduction by default; claim physical erasure only for deployments whose erase command scope is isolated to the cohort being destroyed.
requirements.remaining: None for the destructive command-path proof; shared-namespace sanitize is not a per-zone/per-epoch physical erase primitive. A strong erase deployment still requires a dedicated namespace/media pool, per-cohort key isolation, or hardware erase semantics whose blast radius matches the cohort.
requirements.requirement: Keep security claims bounded to reset eligibility unless sanitize is executed.

requirements.next_action: Use per-cohort key isolation as the deployable strong-erase scope; do not call shared-namespace sanitize per epoch.
requirements.remaining: None for the erase-scope/blast-radius gap. This remains crypto-erase by per-cohort key destruction, not proof that zone reset physically erases NAND.
requirements.requirement: Demonstrate a cohort-scoped erase blast radius without shared-namespace sanitize.

requirements.next_action: Use run_actual_zns_summary_pipeline.py after changing any derived artifact.
requirements.remaining: Raw long-running physical replays still require device availability and time.
requirements.requirement: Make the generated actual-ZNS comparison reproducible and hash-checked.

requirements.next_action: Use the captured sysbench+PQC trace as external-validity evidence; do not treat it as a ZNS placement result.
requirements.remaining: None for the real-application block-trace gap. This still does not prove SPDK/ZenFS tail latency or public-DOGI end-to-end parity.
requirements.requirement: Capture real application block traces while PQC lifecycle side writes are persisted.

requirements.next_action: Keep exact-baseline and same-path caveats visible.
requirements.remaining: External readiness is scoped to the current claim, not an absolute proof of every possible device/firmware stack.
requirements.requirement: Show external/system readiness has no current paper blockers for the scoped claim.

scope: completion audit for actual-ZNS DOGI/SepBIT/MiDAS/FIFO vs QUASAR comparison
